name: The Outcast
overview: Set in post-war Britain, ten year-old Lewis Aldridge is grief-stricken as he struggles to cope with the death of his beloved mother. Left under the care of his emotionally distant father Gilbert, whom he barely knows and who quickly remarries, Lewis is forced to bury his feelings.

trailers.title: The Outcast Q&A with Greg Wise, George MacKay and Jessica Barden | BFI
